backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing a script repository with CRUD operations, user profile management, access control via MixinAuthorization, and soft-delete support for scripts.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three frontend features (home page script display, my scripts page, and React Query hooks audit) to their relevant files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary providing one-line summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend structure.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining OKLCH-based light and dark theme CSS custom properties for colors, borders, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Rawly41 Store app with PWA meta tags, manifest link, Apple touch icon, and theme color configuration.
frontend/public/manifest.json: PWA manifest for Rawly41 Store defining app name, icons, display mode, theme color, and start URL for home screen installation.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with routes for home, script detail, and my-scripts pages, wrapped in ThemeProvider, ProfileSetupModal, OnboardingModal, and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/AuthGuard.tsx: Empty file placeholder for a route protection component intended to redirect unauthenticated users.
frontend/src/components/CodeBlock.tsx: Displays a code snippet in a styled pre/code block with a hover-revealed copy-to-clipboard button using the Clipboard API and sonner toasts.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: App shell component rendering a sticky header with the Rawly41 logo, navigation links (My Scripts, Submit Script) for authenticated users, a login button, main content slot, and a footer.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Button component that triggers Internet Identity login or logout, clears the React Query cache on logout, and shows a spinner during the login-in-progress state.
First-visit modal prompting users to add the app to their home screen, dismissed via a 'Got It!' button that persists the seen state through the useOnboardingModal hook.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog that prompts newly authenticated users to enter their name and save a profile; only renders for authenticated users who have no existing profile.
frontend/src/components/ScriptCard.tsx: Card component that displays a script's title, category badge, description, creation date, and truncated author principal as a navigable link.
frontend/src/components/ScriptGrid.tsx: Responsive grid that renders a list of ScriptCard components with loading skeleton placeholders and an empty-state message.
frontend/src/components/ScriptSearch.tsx: Search and filter bar with a debounced text input and a category dropdown that calls parent callbacks on change, plus a clear button.
frontend/src/components/ScriptSubmission: Form card for submitting a new script with title, description, category select, and code content fields, using the useCreateScript mutation and toast notifications.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) via React Query, and invalidates all dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, exposing identity state, login/clear functions, and login status flags backed by AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useOnboardingModal.ts: Hook that tracks whether the onboarding modal has been seen using localStorage, exposing open state and a dismiss function.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for fetching and mutating user profiles and scripts (get all, get by id, search, filter, create, update) against the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the app with QueryClientProvider for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Home page displaying a hero banner, script browsing with search and category filtering, and a script submission form for authenticated users.
frontend/src/pages/MyScriptsPage.tsx: Authenticated user page listing their own scripts with inline edit and delete dialogs, redirecting unauthenticated users to a login prompt.
frontend/src/pages/ScriptDetailPage.tsx: Detail page for a single script showing its content in a code block with metadata, and a delete option for the script's author.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to read, persist, and clear URL query parameters from both regular and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage fallback.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with OKLCH color tokens, custom fonts, border radii, accordion animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Tracks the current state of the 'Rawly41 Store' project, including schema version, existing features (home page script display, my scripts page, React Query hooks audit), and a pending backend endpoint verification task (AR-4).
